    <link rel="apple-touch-startup-image" href="/template/logo-icon.png">
    <link rel="manifest" href="/content/pwa.webmanifest">
    <style>
    /*FONTS ex: @import url('... */
    @import url('//fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Neuton:ital,wght@0,200;0,300;0,400;0,700;0,800;1,400&family=Style+Script&display=swap');
    /****** SITE DEFAULTS ************/
    html body {
    --primary-color-rgb: 25,95,147;     /* Steel Blue (#195f93) */
    --secondary-color-rgb: 255,195,115;  /* Soft Gold (#ffc373) */
    --tertiary-color-rgb: 168,67,50;     /* Rust Red (#a84332) */
    --background-color-rgb: 249,243,234; /* Warm Cream (#f9f3ea) */
    --default-white-rgb: 255,255,255;
    --default-black-rgb: 0,0,0;
        
    --background-color: rgba(var(--background-color-rgb),1);
    ​
    --title-font-family: 'Style Script', script;
    --body-font-family: 'Neuton', serif;
        
    --last-break-point: 50.99rem;
    --site-max-width: 1920px;
        
    --slideshow-height: min(56.25vw, 810px);
    --slideshow-width: min(100vw, 1440px);
        
    --slideshow-height-mobile: 56.25vw;
    --slideshow-width-mobile: 100vw;
        
    --gl-num-boxes: 5;
        
    }
    </style>
